functions.name: addAzureServiceBus
functions.description: Adds an Azure Service Bus Namespace resource to the application model. This resource can be used to create queue, topic, and subscription resources.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource.

functions.name: addServiceBusQueue
functions.description: Adds an Azure Service Bus Queue resource to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the queue resource.

parameters.name: queueName
parameters.description: The name of the Service Bus Queue. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as `name`.

functions.name: addServiceBusSubscription
functions.description: Adds an Azure Service Bus Subscription resource to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the subscription resource.

parameters.name: subscriptionName
parameters.description: The name of the Service Bus Subscription. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as `name`.

functions.name: addServiceBusTopic
functions.description: Adds an Azure Service Bus Topic resource to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the topic resource.

parameters.name: topicName
parameters.description: The name of the Service Bus Topic. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as `name`.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Azure Service Bus Queue.

functions.name: deadLetteringOnMessageExpiration
functions.description: A value that indicates whether this queue has dead letter support when a message expires.

functions.name: defaultMessageTimeToLive
functions.description: ISO 8601 default message timespan to live value. This is the duration after which the message expires, starting from when the message is sent to Service Bus. This is the default value used when TimeToLive is not set on a message itself.

functions.name: duplicateDetectionHistoryTimeWindow
functions.description: ISO 8601 timeSpan structure that defines the duration of the duplicate detection history. The default value is 10 minutes.

functions.name: forwardDeadLetteredMessagesTo
functions.description: Queue/Topic name to forward the Dead Letter message.

functions.name: forwardTo
functions.description: Queue/Topic name to forward the messages.

functions.name: lockDuration
functions.description: ISO 8601 timespan duration of a peek-lock; that is, the amount of time that the message is locked for other receivers. The maximum value for LockDuration is 5 minutes; the default value is 1 minute.

functions.name: maxDeliveryCount
functions.description: The maximum delivery count. A message is automatically dead-lettered after this number of deliveries.

functions.name: parent
functions.description: Gets the parent Azure Service Bus resource.

functions.name: queueName
functions.description: The queue name.

functions.name: requiresDuplicateDetection
functions.description: A value indicating if this queue requires duplicate detection.

functions.name: requiresSession
functions.description: A value that indicates whether the queue supports the concept of sessions.

functions.name: runAsEmulator
functions.description: Configures the Azure Service Bus resource to run with the local emulator

functions.name: withConfigurationFile
functions.description: Copies the configuration file into an Azure Service Bus emulator resource.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file on the AppHost where the emulator configuration is located.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port for the Azure Service Bus emulator is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used, a random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withProperties
functions.description: Allows setting the properties of an Azure Service Bus Queue resource.

parameters.name: configure
parameters.description: A method that can be used for customizing the `AzureServiceBusQueueResource`.

functions.name: withProperties
functions.description: Allows setting the properties of an Azure Service Bus Topic resource.

parameters.name: configure
parameters.description: A method that can be used for customizing the `AzureServiceBusTopicResource`.

functions.name: withProperties
functions.description: Allows setting the properties of an Azure Service Bus Subscription resource.

parameters.name: configure
parameters.description: A method that can be used for customizing the `AzureServiceBusSubscriptionResource`.

functions.name: withServiceBusRoleAssignments
functions.description: Assigns the specified roles to the given resource, granting it the necessary permissions on the target Azure Service Bus namespace. This replaces the default role assignments for the resource.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target Azure Service Bus namespace.

parameters.name: roles
parameters.description: The Service Bus roles to be assigned.

capabilities.name: withConfigurationFile
capabilities.description: Copies the configuration file into an Azure Service Bus emulator resource.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file on the AppHost where the emulator configuration is located.

capabilities.name: withHostPort
capabilities.description: Configures the host port for the Azure Service Bus emulator is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used, a random port will be assigned.
